name: Maternal GFR in first trimester
tier_rationale: Tier A pending re-review. Source citation: davison-hytten-1974-gfr. Technique: 24-hour creatinine clearance. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, weeks 8-12.
notes: GFR in the first trimester; rise begins early in pregnancy.

name: Maternal glomerular filtration rate at term
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: cheung-lafayette-2013-renal. Technique: Inulin or iohexol clearance. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, third trimester.
notes: GFR at term; elevated approximately 40-50% above non-pregnant baseline.

name: Maternal plasma creatinine at term
tier_rationale: Tier A pending re-review. Source citation: cheung-lafayette-2013-renal. Technique: Enzymatic colorimetric assay. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, third trimester. Caveats: A creatinine in the upper non-pregnant reference range (e.g. 0.9 mg/dL) is abnormal in pregnancy.
notes: Plasma creatinine at term; reduced below non-pregnant reference. Caveats: A creatinine in the upper non-pregnant reference range (e.g. 0.9 mg/dL) is abnormal in pregnancy.
